ORDER DENYING MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND DENYING SUMMARY ADJUDICATION, IN PART, AND GRANTING SUMMARY ADJUDICATION , IN PART

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT, AND YMCA OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE REMAINS AN ISSUE WHETHER THE PROGRAM WAS CHILD CARE AS TO WHICH A LIABILITY WAIVER COULD BE ENFORCED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 1 BUT GRANTED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 2 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO WHETHER THE SURFACE UNDER THE SLIDE WAS TOO HARD; THE ONLY DEFECT RAISED BY THE COMPLAINT.
